title: 10 health benefits of Tilia × europaea (lime)
intro: Tilia × europaea has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of lime, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, have been shown to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. For example, consuming lime tea or extracts can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and respiratory issues, while topical applications may soothe skin irritations and wounds. By incorporating lime into daily routines, individuals may experience improved overall well-being and enhanced quality of life.
